news.headline: America offers US$4 million bounty for arrest of Chinese money launderer
news.summary:
The United States is offering a reward of up to US$4 million for information leading to the arrest of a Chinese national who fled the US after being convicted of money laundering.
The bounty on fugitive Daren Li, 43, was announced by the State Department on Thursday through its Transnational Organis

news.headline: US-China AI race intensifies as DeepSeek releases 'reduced' cost model
news.summary: China's DeepSeek on Friday released a new AI model with "drastically reduced" costs that it said was capable of processing extra-long texts to help it complete tasks. The company caused shockwaves last year after it revealed a reasoning model that upended assumptions of US dominance in the sector.
